projects.title: Varsity Introduction 2026
projects.description: An interactive web introduction page built for the 2026 varsity cohort. Features smooth navigation, key information sections, and a welcoming design experience for incoming students — deployed and live on Vercel.

projects.title: Wordly — SPA Word Game
projects.description: A Wordle-inspired word-guessing game built as a Single Page Application. Players get six attempts to guess a hidden five-letter word, with colour-coded hints (green, yellow, grey) after each guess to guide them to the answer.

projects.title: Color Clock
projects.description: A creative clock that changes the background color based on the current time — each hour, minute, and second maps to a unique RGB value, resulting in a constantly shifting colour palette. A fun blend of art and code.

projects.title: Shop Ease Catalog
projects.description: A clean and responsive e-commerce product catalog with category filtering, keyword search, and a dynamic cart. Fetches product data from a public REST API and renders it with a fluid, user-friendly shopping interface.

projects.title: My Portfolio
projects.description: A personal developer portfolio built with TypeScript showcasing skills, projects, and experience. Features smooth animations, a fully responsive layout, and an elegant dark-themed design that highlights work in an engaging way.

projects.title: Voting Poll App
projects.description: An interactive real-time voting and polling application where users can create polls, cast votes, and view live results. Designed for simplicity and responsiveness across all screen sizes with a clean, dynamic interface.

projects.title: Ian Blog Site
projects.description: A full-featured personal blog platform built with TypeScript, supporting post creation, category filtering, and a clean reading experience. Optimised for both desktop and mobile with a focus on typography and content clarity.

projects.title: Dynamic Product Dashboard
projects.description: A feature-rich product management dashboard with dynamic filtering, sorting, and keyword search. Enables users to browse and manage a full product catalog with a clean, intuitive UI built entirely in vanilla JavaScript.
